perPadParams.name: Exciter Type
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE selector. Stored as the ExciterType enum directly in PadConfig.exciterType. On-wire as a StringListParameter: per-pad spec declares stepCount=5 (6 entries → 5 steps), idx = round(norm*5). Decode in voice_pool.cpp setPadConfigSelector / setPadConfigField clamps to [0, ExciterType::kCount-1]. Enum order: 0=Impulse,1=Mallet,2=NoiseBurst,3=Friction,4=FMImpulse,5=Feedback. Applied via DrumVoice::setExciterType at applyPadConfigToSlot (voice_pool.cpp:775).
perPadParams.controls: Which excitation backend strikes the body. Each exciter shapes the transient and what the body 'hears': Impulse=raised-cosine click; Mallet=softer beater; NoiseBurst=violet-noise bandpass burst; Friction=transient struck-bow (BowExciter); FMImpulse=Chowning bell-FM tone (drives carrier); Feedback=energy-limited self-oscillating body↔exciter loop.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (selector). Note: secondary exciter params 32/33/34/35 are no-ops unless the matching exciter is selected.

perPadParams.name: Body Model
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE selector. Stored as BodyModelType enum in PadConfig.bodyModel. On-wire StringListParameter; global selector (kBodyModelId) has 6 entries {Membrane,Plate,Shell,String,Bell,NoiseBody}, per-pad spec declares stepCount=5. Decode clamps to [0,BodyModelType::kCount-1]. Enum: 0=Membrane,1=Plate,2=Shell,3=String,4=Bell,5=NoiseBody. Applied via DrumVoice::setBodyModel.
perPadParams.controls: The resonator. Membrane=Bessel circular drumhead (48 modes); Plate=Kirchhoff square plate (48 modes, metallic); Shell=free-free Euler-Bernoulli bar/glockenspiel ratios (32 modes); String=WaveguideString (NOT modal bank); Bell=church-bell Chladni partials (16 modes, hum at 0.25*f0); NoiseBody=plate ratios (32 modes) + internal noise layer (cymbal/hat). Sets natural f0 base: Membrane 500, Plate/String/Bell 800, Shell/NoiseBody 1500 Hz, all *0.1^size.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (selector). Determines which mapper runs and which params matter (e.g. String ignores modeStretch/scatter/damping-b1/b3, air-loading; tension mod is Membrane-only).

perPadParams.name: Material
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] stored verbatim in PadConfig.material; passed un-denormalized to the mapper as VoiceCommonParams.material. Mapper-specific effect: Membrane brightness=material, baseDecayTime=lerp(0.15,0.8,material)*(1+0.1*size), stretch=material*0.3(+modeStretch delta); Plate brightness=0.5+0.5*material, decay base lerp(0.4,2.0,material); Shell brightness=0.85+0.15*material, base lerp(0.15,0.8); Bell brightness=0.7+0.3*material, base lerp(0.4,1.4); NoiseBody brightness=0.7+0.3*material, base lerp(0.2,1.0), noise cutoff=clamp(1500+5000*material), noise reso=0.6+0.4*material; String brightness_=1-material (inverted loop-filter), decay base lerp(0.5,4.0,material). Brightness then drives the b3 high-freq damping unless b1/b3 overrides set.
perPadParams.controls: Woody↔metallic. Controls modal brightness (high-mode damping b3 via legacy derivation), decay-time base scale, and per-body spectral tilt. Also the target of Material Morph and Tightness/Body Size macros.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (different formula each). Strongest perceptual lever.

perPadParams.name: Size
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] stored in PadConfig.size, passed verbatim as VoiceCommonParams.size. f0 = base * 0.1^size where base is body-specific (Membrane 500, Plate/String/Bell 800, Shell/NoiseBody 1500 Hz). So norm 0→base Hz (small/high), norm 1→base/10 Hz (large/low). Also adds (1+0.1*size) to baseDecayTime in every modal mapper. naturalFundamentalHz computed in bodies/natural_fundamental.h.
perPadParams.controls: Body fundamental pitch (1 decade range). Larger body = lower f0 = longer ring-up (weaker b3*f^2 damping). Drives ToneShaper pitch-env baseline, ModeInject f0, tension-mod center, and the secondary-shell f0.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies.

perPadParams.name: Decay
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.decay. In every modal mapper: decayTime = baseDecayTime * exp(lerp(ln0.3, ln3.0, decay)) * skewBias — i.e. a 0.3x..3.0x (10x range) multiplier on the body's base decay time. NoiseBody also scales its noise envelope decay 60ms*same factor. String: decayTime=base*same factor. NOTE: when bodyDampingB1 override is non-sentinel, b1 replaces the decayTime-derived flat damping, so Decay's effect on the flat-damping term is overridden (it still feeds the legacy law fallback / cache key).
perPadParams.controls: Ring length / RT60 of the body. Maps to the modal bank's flat damping b1 (1/decayTime) in the legacy derivation.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. Overridden by Body Damping b1 (offset 50) when that is set off-sentinel.

perPadParams.name: Strike Position
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.strikePosition → VoiceCommonParams.strikePos. Membrane: r_over_a=strikePos*0.9, amplitudes=|J_m(j_mn*r_over_a)| (Bessel mode-shape sampling). Plate/Shell/NoiseBody: per-mode amplitude via computePlateAmplitude/computeShellAmplitude(k,strikePos), floored at 0.05/0.03. Bell: computeBellAmplitude. String: pickPosition=clamp(strikePos,0.02,0.98) (comb-filter pluck position). Also drives the secondary shell bank's mode shape (drum_voice.h:1270).
perPadParams.controls: Center↔edge strike. Re-weights which modes get energy (mode-shape sampling), changing timbre/brightness without changing pitch. For String it's pick position (notch comb).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (Bessel for Membrane, beam/plate mode shapes for others, pick position for String).

perPadParams.name: Level
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.level → DrumVoice::setLevel(level_). Applied LINEARLY as final voice gain: out = hardClip(shaped*env*level_) (drum_voice.h:511). NOT dB; it is a linear attenuation before the transparent hardClip safety rail. Per-pad pan and master gain are applied after, downstream.
perPadParams.controls: Per-pad output volume / mix balance. Linear pre-limiter attenuation. Primary per-pad loudness make-up together with Master Gain.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all.

perPadParams.name: Filter Type
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-3-way. PadConfig.tsFilterType. Decode in applyPadConfigToSlot: idx=clamp(int(tsFilterType*3.0),0,2) → 0=Lowpass,1=Highpass,2=Bandpass. (per-pad spec stepCount=2 → 3 entries.) Note the header comment '0=LP,0.5=HP,1.0=BP' matches *3 truncation. Applied to ToneShaper SVF.
perPadParams.controls: ToneShaper post-body SVF response shape.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all, but a no-op unless the filter is engaged (cutoff < 20 kHz OR filter-env amount != 0).

perPadParams.name: Filter Cutoff
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsFilterCutoff. Denorm: hz = 20 * 1000^cutoff → 20 Hz (norm 0) .. 20000 Hz (norm 1), log. Applied ToneShaper::setFilterCutoff (voice_pool.cpp:833). Filter BYPASSED when cutoffHz>=20000 AND filterEnvAmount==0, so norm 1.0 default = transparent.
perPadParams.controls: ToneShaper SVF base cutoff. Also target of the Brightness macro.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (post-body tone shaping). Default 1.0 = bypass.

perPadParams.name: Filter Resonance
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsFilterResonance. ToneShaper::setFilterResonance maps q = kButterworthQ + clamp(q,0,1)*(10.0 - kButterworthQ). So norm 0 = Butterworth (~0.707), norm 1 = Q 10.
perPadParams.controls: SVF resonance/emphasis at cutoff.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (only audible when filter engaged).

perPadParams.name: Filter Env Amount
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] BIPOLAR. PadConfig.tsFilterEnvAmount. Denorm: amount = tsFilterEnvAmount*2 - 1 → [-1,+1] (voice_pool.cpp:836). Per-sample cutoff modulation: modCutoff = cutoffHz * 2^(3*amount*envValue) (i.e. up to ±3 octaves). norm 0.5 = 0 = no modulation (and keeps filter bypassed if cutoff>=20k).
perPadParams.controls: How much the filter envelope sweeps the SVF cutoff, and direction (down/up).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; no-op at norm 0.5.

perPadParams.name: Drive Amount
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsDriveAmount → ToneShaper::setDriveAmount. internalDrive = 1 + drive*9 → [1,10]. Waveshaper is ReciprocalSqrt (x/sqrt(x^2+1)); post makeup driveMakeup_=1/internalDrive (M-2: unity small-signal gain, so Drive adds harmonics not level). Wet/dry: x + drive*(shaped-x). Stage BYPASSED at norm 0 (exact dry).
perPadParams.controls: Saturation / odd-harmonic warmth (timbre, not loudness after M-2 makeup).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; bypassed at 0.

perPadParams.name: Fold Amount
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsFoldAmount → ToneShaper::setFoldAmount. wavefolder foldAmount = fold*PI → [0,pi] (Serge-typical sine fold). Wet/dry: x + fold*(folded-x). Bypassed at 0.
perPadParams.controls: Wavefolding (aggressive added harmonics, west-coast timbre).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; bypassed at 0.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Start
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.tsPitchEnvStart. Denorm: hz = 20 * 100^start, clamped [20,2000] → 20 Hz (norm 0) .. 2000 Hz (norm 1). norm 0 → 20 Hz. ToneShaper::setPitchEnvStartHz. Pitch env only active when PitchEnv Time > 0.
perPadParams.controls: Start frequency of the body's pitch glide (the iconic 808 boom start). Also nudged by the Punch macro.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (modal bodies rescale all modes; String retunes waveguide). No-op when PitchEnv Time==0.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv End
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.tsPitchEnvEnd. Denorm: hz = 20*100^end clamped [20,2000]. Same mapping as Start. ToneShaper::setPitchEnvEndHz.
perPadParams.controls: Final (settle) frequency of the pitch glide.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. No-op when PitchEnv Time==0.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Time
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsPitchEnvTime. Denorm: ms = tsPitchEnvTime*500 → [0,500] ms (voice_pool.cpp:857). 0 = pitch envelope DISABLED (returns naturalFundamentalHz). This is the master enable for the whole pitch-env feature.
perPadParams.controls: Duration of the pitch glide; 0 disables it entirely.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. SENTINEL: 0 = pitch env off.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Curve
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] (Phase 10 repurposed from a 2-step Exp/Lin StringList). PadConfig.tsPitchEnvCurve. Denorm: curveAmount = 2*curve - 1 → [-1,+1] (voice_pool.cpp:860). 0.5=linear; <0.5 fast initial drop (classic 808 exp decay); >0.5 slow start/fast end. Segment-1 curve (Start→Mid if knee on, else Start→End).
perPadParams.controls: Shape of pitch-glide segment 1.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. No-op when PitchEnv Time==0. Default spec 0.5; PadConfig struct default 0.0.

perPadParams.name: Filter Env Atk
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] CUBIC, PadConfig.tsFilterEnvAttack. Denorm: ms = aN^3 * 500 → [0,500] ms (cubic, matches ADSRDisplay drag encoding, voice_pool.cpp:844). ToneShaper filter ADSR attack.
perPadParams.controls: Filter-envelope attack time.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; only audible when Filter Env Amount != 0.

perPadParams.name: Filter Env Dec
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] CUBIC, PadConfig.tsFilterEnvDecay. Denorm: ms = dN^3 * 2000 → [0,2000] ms. ToneShaper filter ADSR decay.
perPadParams.controls: Filter-envelope decay time.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; only audible when Filter Env Amount != 0.

perPadParams.name: Filter Env Sus
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LINEAR, PadConfig.tsFilterEnvSustain → ToneShaper::setFilterEnvSustain verbatim [0,1] sustain level.
perPadParams.controls: Filter-envelope sustain level.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; only audible when Filter Env Amount != 0.

perPadParams.name: Filter Env Rel
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] CUBIC, PadConfig.tsFilterEnvRelease. Denorm: ms = rN^3 * 2000 → [0,2000] ms. ToneShaper filter ADSR release.
perPadParams.controls: Filter-envelope release time.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; only audible when Filter Env Amount != 0.

perPadParams.name: Mode Stretch
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.modeStretch is the NORM of physical [0.5,2.0]. UnnaturalZone denorm: physical = 0.5 + modeStretch*1.5 (voice_pool.cpp:876). Default norm 0.333333 → physical 1.0 = unstretched/physical. Mappers convert back: stretchNorm=clamp((phys-0.5)/1.5,0,1) fed to the bank as its [0,1] stretch scalar; Membrane additionally blends with material*0.3 so unity is Phase-1 bit-identical.
perPadParams.controls: Inharmonicity: stretches/compresses modal partial spacing away from the physical ratios. Body Size macro nudges it.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies (Membrane/Plate/Shell/Bell/NoiseBody). NO-OP for String (waveguide, ignores stretch). norm 0.333 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Decay Skew
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.decaySkew is NORM of bipolar [-1,+1]. UnnaturalZone denorm: phys = decaySkew*2 - 1 (voice_pool.cpp:878). Default norm 0.5 → 0.0 = no skew. Two effects in every modal mapper: (a) global skewBias=1-0.3*skew on decayTime; (b) per-mode amplitude tilt ratio^(-skew), clamped to [1/8,8] (kDecaySkewMaxModeTilt). skew==0 is bit-identical (guarded).
perPadParams.controls: Tilts spectral energy/decay balance high↔low across modes (per-mode decaySkew tilt added to all bodies in the audit). Tightness macro nudges it.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies. NO-OP for String. norm 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Mode Inject
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.modeInjectAmount → UnnaturalZone.modeInject.setAmount verbatim. ModeInject = 8 integer-harmonic oscillators (1..8) at the body f0, amplitudes 1/k (-6dB/oct), phases re-randomized per noteOn. Output = amount*bank.process(); ZERO-LEAK bypass at amount==0 (no oscillator call). Summed into the signal pre-ToneShaper.
perPadParams.controls: Adds a synthetic tonal harmonic series on top of the body (pitched 'body' / extra fundamental weight). Brightness + Complexity macros both nudge it.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (uses naturalFundamentalHz). Exact bypass at 0.

perPadParams.name: Nonlinear Coupling
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.nonlinearCoupling → UnnaturalZone.nonlinearCoupling.setAmount. Amplitude-dependent waveshaping: env=RMS follower of body; drive=1+6.0*velocity*amount*env; shaped=recipSqrt(body*drive); out=body+amount*(shaped-body). EXACT bypass at amount==0 (no follower update).
perPadParams.controls: Louder=brighter dynamic harmonic excitation (mimics nonlinear plate/shell coupling); velocity-sensitive. Complexity macro nudges it.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. Exact bypass at 0.

perPadParams.name: Morph Enabled
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-bool [0,1], stepCount=1. PadConfig.morphEnabled. setEnabled(morphEnabled>=0.5). When ON, Material is driven by the Material Morph envelope from Start→End over Duration each noteOn; when OFF the voice uses its own material_ (Phase-1 path).
perPadParams.controls: Toggles the per-note Material Morph (time-varying material/timbre sweep).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (morph drives Material into the active mapper / String setters).

perPadParams.name: Morph Start
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.morphStart → materialMorph.setStart verbatim (a Material value [0,1]).
perPadParams.controls: Material value at note start when Morph Enabled.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op unless Morph Enabled.

perPadParams.name: Morph End
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.morphEnd → materialMorph.setEnd verbatim (Material value).
perPadParams.controls: Material value the morph settles to.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op unless Morph Enabled.

perPadParams.name: Morph Duration
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LINEAR, PadConfig.morphDuration. Denorm: ms = 10 + morphDuration*1990 → [10,2000] ms (voice_pool.cpp:891). Default norm 0.095477 → 200 ms.
perPadParams.controls: Time over which Material morphs Start→End.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op unless Morph Enabled.

perPadParams.name: Morph Curve
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-bool [0,1], stepCount=1. PadConfig.morphCurve. setCurve(morphCurve>=0.5): false=Linear lerp, true=Exponential (start*(end/start)^t).
perPadParams.controls: Linear vs exponential shape of the Material morph.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op unless Morph Enabled.

perPadParams.name: Choke Group
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE [0,8], stepCount=8. PadConfig.chokeGroup (uint8). Decode: g = clamp(int(norm*8 + 0.5),0,8). 0 = no choke; 1..8 = choke-group membership (a new hit in the same group cuts others via fast-release). Also written to chokeGroups_ table.
perPadParams.controls: Mute-group assignment (e.g. open/closed hat).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (kit-level routing). SENTINEL: 0 = no choke.

perPadParams.name: Output Bus
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE [0,15], stepCount=15. PadConfig.outputBus (uint8). Decode: clamp(int(norm*15 + 0.5),0,15). 0 = main bus only; 1..15 = aux bus index. Aux buses are PRE-master sends (master gain applies to main only).
perPadParams.controls: Multi-out routing for the pad.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (routing). 0 = main.

perPadParams.name: FM Ratio
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.fmRatio → FMImpulseExciter::setModulatorRatio. Denorm: modulatorRatio = 1.0 + 3.0*norm → [1.0,4.0] carrier:modulator ratio. Default norm 0.133333 → 1.4 (classic Chowning bell). Applied at trigger; carrier ratio fixed 1.0, base freq velocity-driven 400..2500 Hz.
perPadParams.controls: FM modulator:carrier ratio = bell/metallic inharmonic spectrum of the FMImpulse exciter.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: FMImpulse exciter ONLY. NO-OP for all other exciters.

perPadParams.name: Feedback Amount
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.feedbackAmount → FeedbackExciter::setFeedbackAmount (feedbackDrive_). At trigger: drive = velocity + feedbackDrive*(1-velocity); feedbackAmount_ = drive*kMaxFeedback(0.85). 0 = velocity-only (legacy); 1 = always max permitted feedback. SC-008 stability preserved (≤0.85).
perPadParams.controls: Self-oscillation drive floor of the Feedback exciter (sustained energy / squeal intensity).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: Feedback exciter ONLY. NO-OP for all other exciters. (Feedback exciter also forces the body's slow per-sample path + keeps the -3 dBFS soft-clip.)

perPadParams.name: NoiseBurst Duration
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.noiseBurstDuration → NoiseBurstExciter::setContactMs (via setNoiseBurstContactMs, passes NORM). Denorm inside: ms = 2 + norm*13 → [2,15] ms burst length. Velocity then shortens it (factor 1.2..0.8). Violet noise → bandpass.
perPadParams.controls: Length of the NoiseBurst exciter's filtered-noise burst (snare/clap body contact time).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: NoiseBurst exciter ONLY. NO-OP for other exciters. (Also reused by the Punch macro as a generic attack proxy.)

perPadParams.name: Friction Pressure
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.frictionPressure → FrictionExciter::setPressure (pressureAmount_). At trigger: bow pressure = clamp(0.1 + 0.4*velocity + pressure*0.5, 0,1). 0 = velocity-only; 1 = +0.5 heavier bowing.
perPadParams.controls: Bow pressure bias of the Friction (struck-bow) exciter — scrape/squeal intensity.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: Friction exciter ONLY. NO-OP for other exciters.

perPadParams.name: Coupling Amount
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.couplingAmount. Per-pad participation weight in the GLOBAL cross-pad sympathetic-resonance engine (Phase 5). Read by VoicePool/coupling engine on noteOn to scale how much this pad drives/receives sympathetic resonators. Complexity macro nudges it.
perPadParams.controls: How strongly this pad participates in inter-pad sympathetic coupling (snare buzz / tom resonance network).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all (only audible when the kit-level Global Coupling / Snare Buzz / Tom Resonance > 0). Distinct from per-pad head↔shell Coupling Strength (offset 54).

perPadParams.name: Tightness
perPadParams.normToPhysical: MACRO, normalised [0,1], neutral 0.5. PadConfig.macroTightness. MacroMapper layers delta-from-0.5 onto underlying params: material += linDelta(m,0.30); decay -= expDelta(m,0.25) (inverted); decaySkew += linDelta(m,1.00). All deltas incremental and clamped [0,1]. 0.5 = zero delta (preserves preset values).
perPadParams.controls: One-knob 'tightness': brighter material + shorter decay + skew toward fast modes as it rises.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (proxies onto material/decay/decaySkew which are themselves body-dependent). 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Brightness
perPadParams.normToPhysical: MACRO [0,1], neutral 0.5. PadConfig.macroBrightness. Deltas: tsFilterCutoff += linDelta(m,0.40); modeInjectAmount += linDelta(m,0.30). Incremental, clamped.
perPadParams.controls: One-knob brightness: opens the tone-shaper filter + adds injected harmonics.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Body Size
perPadParams.normToPhysical: MACRO [0,1], neutral 0.5. PadConfig.macroBodySize. Deltas: size += linDelta(m,0.40); modeStretch += linDelta(m,0.20); decay += linDelta(m,0.20). Incremental, clamped. (Note: nudges the NORM of size/modeStretch/decay, which then denormalize per their own mappings.)
perPadParams.controls: One-knob body scale: lower pitch (bigger), more stretch, longer decay as it rises.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (modeStretch delta is a no-op for String). 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Punch
perPadParams.normToPhysical: MACRO [0,1], neutral 0.5. PadConfig.macroPunch. Deltas: tsPitchEnvStart += expDelta(m,0.50); tsPitchEnvTime -= linDelta(m,0.40) (faster); noiseBurstDuration -= linDelta(m,0.30) (shorter attack). Incremental, clamped.
perPadParams.controls: One-knob attack punch: deeper+faster pitch-env drop and shorter exciter contact.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; pitch-env deltas only audible once PitchEnv Time>0 (the macro can itself raise Time from 0). 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Complexity
perPadParams.normToPhysical: MACRO [0,1], neutral 0.5. PadConfig.macroComplexity. Deltas: couplingAmount += linDelta(m,0.50); nonlinearCoupling += linDelta(m,0.30); modeInjectAmount += linDelta(m,0.30). Incremental, clamped.
perPadParams.controls: One-knob complexity: more sympathetic coupling, nonlinear brightening, and injected modes.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies. 0.5 = neutral.

perPadParams.name: Noise Mix
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.noiseLayerMix → NoiseLayer.mix (verbatim, clamped). The parallel noise layer output = mix*env*filteredNoise, then *kStandaloneOutputGain(0.243) into the mix. mix<=0 fully bypasses the layer (zero output). Layer is always-on, independent of Body Model.
perPadParams.controls: Level of the always-on parallel filtered-noise layer (snare hiss, hat sizzle, breathiness).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies (separate from NoiseBody's internal noise). 0 = off.

perPadParams.name: Noise Cutoff
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.noiseLayerCutoff. NoiseLayer denormCutoff: hz = exp(ln40 + norm*(ln18000-ln40)) → [40,18000] Hz. Filter is LOWPASS in the parallel DrumVoice layer (switched from bandpass in prepare to avoid a pitched-beep peak).
perPadParams.controls: Noise-layer filter cutoff (timbre/brightness of the noise).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op when Noise Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Noise Resonance
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.noiseLayerResonance. denormResonance: q = 0.3 + norm*4.7 → [0.3,5.0]. NoiseLayer SVF resonance.
perPadParams.controls: Noise-layer filter resonance.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op when Noise Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Noise Decay
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.noiseLayerDecay. denormDecayMs: ms = exp(ln20 + norm*(ln2000-ln20)) → [20,2000] ms; envelope decay=ms, release=ms*0.5, sustain 0.
perPadParams.controls: Noise-layer amplitude-envelope decay length.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op when Noise Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Noise Color
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE-from-continuous [0,1], PadConfig.noiseLayerColor. denormColor thresholds: <0.25 Brown, <0.55 Pink, <0.80 White, else Violet (4 bands). Sets NoiseOscillator color.
perPadParams.controls: Spectral tilt of the noise source (Brown→Violet, dark→bright).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op when Noise Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Click Mix
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.clickLayerMix → ClickLayer.mix. Always-on attack transient (2-5 ms shaped filtered-noise). Output = mix*velocity*env*filteredNoise; routed BOTH half-amplitude into the exciter feed (drives body modes) AND full into the output, scaled by kStandaloneOutputGain(0.445). mix<=0 = silent.
perPadParams.controls: Level of the always-on beater/contact click transient (attack definition).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies and all exciters (fires alongside the selected exciter). 0 = off.

perPadParams.name: Click Contact
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.clickLayerContactMs. denormContactMs: ms = 2 + norm*3 → [2,5] ms burst. Velocity shortens it (factor 1-0.3*vel).
perPadParams.controls: Click transient duration (contact time).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; no-op when Click Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Click Brightness
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.clickLayerBrightness. denormBrightness: hz = exp(ln200 + norm*(ln12000-ln200)) → [200,12000] Hz bandpass center.
perPadParams.controls: Click transient bandpass center frequency (dull thud → sharp tick).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all; no-op when Click Mix==0.

perPadParams.name: Body Damping b1
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] with SENTINEL. PadConfig.bodyDampingB1 default -1.0 (sentinel) = derive from Decay knob (legacy 1/decayTime). When >=0: b1 = 0.2 + norm*49.8 → [0.2,50.0] s^-1 flat damping (dampingLawFromParams, membrane_mapper.h). spec default 0.5 → 25 s^-1 (mid-tight) once written. CRITICAL: registered/displayed default is 0.5 but DrumVoice stores -1.0f sentinel until the host actively writes it (preserves bit-identity).
perPadParams.controls: Per-mode FLAT damping (frequency-independent decay floor / overall RT60). Overrides the Decay knob's flat-damping derivation when set.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies (Membrane/Plate/Shell/Bell/NoiseBody). NO-OP for String. SENTINEL -1 = use Decay. Also seeds the secondary-shell b1.

perPadParams.name: Body Damping b3
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] with SENTINEL. PadConfig.bodyDampingB3 default -1.0 (sentinel) = derive from material/brightness ((1-brightness)*kMaxB3). When >=0: b3 = norm*1.0e-3 → [0,1e-3] s (Hz convention). spec default 0.5 → 5e-4. norm 0 = pure flat (metallic, long highs); norm 1 = strong f^2 damping (wood thump). Registered default 0.5; DrumVoice stores -1 sentinel until written.
perPadParams.controls: Per-mode FREQUENCY-SQUARED (b3*f^2) damping = perceived material (metal↔wood). Overrides material-derived high-freq damping when set.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies. NO-OP for String. SENTINEL -1 = derive from Material.

perPadParams.name: Air Loading
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.airLoading → VoiceCommonParams.airLoading. Membrane mapper: each mode freq scaled by scale=1 + airLoading*(targetScale[k]-1) interpolating pure Bessel (0) → Rossing air-loaded curve (1) (kAirLoadingTargetScale). Default 0.6 = realistic deeper membrane. Other modal mappers do NOT consume airLoading (membrane-only frequency correction).
perPadParams.controls: Depresses the lowest Bessel modes per real-drum air-loading physics (Rossing 1982) — 'deeper, less whistly' membrane.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: Membrane body effectively (frequency table applies only in membrane_mapper). NO-OP for Plate/Shell/Bell/NoiseBody/String. Default 0.6.

perPadParams.name: Mode Scatter
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.modeScatter → MapperResult.scatter (clamped [0,1]) → bank's sinusoidal frequency dither (~0 to 15%). 0 = pure ratios (bit-identical).
perPadParams.controls: Natural-imperfection detune dither on modal frequencies (organic variation).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies (passed to ModalResonatorBank). NO-OP for String. 0 = none.

perPadParams.name: Coupling Strength
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.couplingStrength → DrumVoice.couplingStrength_. effectiveCoupling = clamp(strength,0,1) used as feedforward drive: secondary(shell) excitation = bodyOut*coupling, shell output mixed PASSIVELY into the signal (no return path). Only engages when Secondary Enabled>=0.5 AND strength>0.
perPadParams.controls: Head↔shell coupling drive: how much the body excites the parallel secondary (shell) resonator.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: modal bodies, and ONLY when Secondary Enabled (offset 55) is on. NO-OP at 0 or with secondary disabled.

perPadParams.name: Secondary Enabled
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-bool [0,1], stepCount=1. PadConfig.secondaryEnabled. ON when >=0.5. Spins up the 24-mode secondary shell bank at noteOn (only if also Coupling Strength>0).
perPadParams.controls: Enables the parallel secondary (shell) resonator for head↔shell coupling (adds body weight to kicks/shells).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all modal bodies (the shell bank is shell-ratio regardless). No-op unless Coupling Strength>0. Off by default.

perPadParams.name: Secondary Size
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.secondarySize. configureSecondaryBank: sizeRatio = 1 - secondarySize*0.75 → shell f0 = head_f0 * sizeRatio. norm 0 → f0=head f0; norm 0.5 → ~0.625*head f0 (Chromaphone ~0.6 rule); norm 1 → 0.25*head f0.
perPadParams.controls: Shell fundamental relative to the head (lower = bigger shell).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: only when Secondary Enabled + Coupling Strength>0. NO-OP otherwise.

perPadParams.name: Secondary Material
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.secondaryMaterial. configureSecondaryBank: mat=clamp; shell b1 = max(25, 2.5*bodyB1) + (1-mat)*15 s^-1; shell b3 = mat*1e-5. Higher material = brighter/longer shell highs, slightly shorter flat decay.
perPadParams.controls: Shell material/damping (metal↔wood character of the coupled shell).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: only when Secondary Enabled + Coupling Strength>0. NO-OP otherwise.

perPadParams.name: Tension Mod
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tensionModAmt → DrumVoice.tensionModAmt_. tensionAmtEffective = clamp(amt)*kTensionEnergyScale(3.3e-5). Pitch factor = min(1 + tensionAmtEffective*modalEnergyEnv, kTensionPitchModMax≈1.19 = +3 semitones). Drives an energy-dependent upward pitch jump that relaxes as the body decays (Avanzini et al. JASA 2012). 0 = off (no follower work).
perPadParams.controls: Energy-dependent pitch glide ('kerthump' tom tension modulation).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: MEMBRANE body ONLY (gated bodyBank getCurrentType==Membrane). NO-OP for all other bodies. 0 = off.

perPadParams.name: Pad Enabled
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-bool [0,1], stepCount=1. PadConfig.enabled. ON when >=0.5 (default 1.0=ON). When OFF, VoicePool::noteOn early-returns: the pad neither auditions nor allocates a voice nor consumes CPU.
perPadParams.controls: Per-pad on/off (silences a pad without removing it from the kit).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all. SENTINEL/default 1.0 = enabled.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Knee
perPadParams.normToPhysical: DISCRETE float-as-bool [0,1], stepCount=1. PadConfig.tsPitchEnvKneeEnabled. setPitchEnvKneeEnabled(>=0.5). OFF (default) = single-segment Start→End. ON = three-point Start→Mid→End at fraction.
perPadParams.controls: Enables the middle breakpoint of the pitch envelope (two-segment glide).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; no-op when PitchEnv Time==0. Off by default.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Mid
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1] LOG, PadConfig.tsPitchEnvMidPitch. Denorm: hz = 20*100^norm clamped [20,2000] (same mapping as Start/End, voice_pool.cpp:864). Default norm 0.5 → ~141 Hz.
perPadParams.controls: Pitch at the middle breakpoint of the 3-point pitch env.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; only when PitchEnv Time>0 AND PitchEnv Knee on.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Mid Frac
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsPitchEnvMidFraction → setPitchEnvMidFraction (clamped [0,1]) verbatim = fraction of total PitchEnv Time at which the Mid breakpoint occurs.
perPadParams.controls: Time position of the middle breakpoint (fraction of total glide time).
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; only when PitchEnv Time>0 AND PitchEnv Knee on.

perPadParams.name: PitchEnv Curve2
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.tsPitchEnvCurve2. Denorm: amount = 2*norm - 1 → [-1,+1] (voice_pool.cpp:869). 0.5=linear; <0.5 fast drop; >0.5 slow start. Curve of segment 2 (Mid→End).
perPadParams.controls: Shape of pitch-glide segment 2.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all bodies; only when PitchEnv Time>0 AND PitchEnv Knee on.

perPadParams.name: Pan
perPadParams.normToPhysical: Continuous [0,1], PadConfig.pan. Equal-power law referenced to unity-at-center (panGainsForNote, voice_pool.cpp:741): theta=pan*(pi/2); gainL=sqrt2*cos(theta), gainR=sqrt2*sin(theta). norm 0=hard L, 0.5=center (bit-identical to legacy mono-dup), 1=hard R. Applied in the VoicePool mix stage (voice itself is mono), to main and aux alike, AFTER per-voice Level.
perPadParams.controls: Per-pad stereo placement.
perPadParams.meaningfulFor: all. 0.5 = center (default, restores stereo image, audit M-9). First param past the original 64-wide stride (stride widened to 128).

globalParams.name: Material (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.5. UI/automation PROXY that forwards to the SELECTED pad's kPadMaterial (offset 2). Not a separate DSP value. (Phase-1 frozen ID 100.)

globalParams.name: Size (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.5. Proxy → selected pad kPadSize (offset 3).

globalParams.name: Resonance/Decay (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.3 (labelled 'Resonance' in UI). Proxy → selected pad kPadDecay (offset 4).

globalParams.name: Strike Point (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.3. Proxy → selected pad kPadStrikePosition (offset 5).
globalParams.controls: Edits the selected pad's Strike Position.

globalParams.name: Level (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.8 (unit dB label). Proxy → selected pad kPadLevel (offset 6).

globalParams.name: Exciter Type (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter 6 entries {Impulse,Mallet,NoiseBurst,Friction,FMImpulse,Feedback}. Proxy → selected pad kPadExciterType (offset 0).

globalParams.name: Body Model (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter 6 entries {Membrane,Plate,Shell,String,Bell,NoiseBody}. Proxy → selected pad kPadBodyModel (offset 1).

globalParams.name: Exciter FM Ratio (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadFMRatio (offset 32). norm→[1.0,4.0] ratio. Registered default 0.133333 (→1.4).
globalParams.controls: Selected pad FM ratio. Meaningful only for FMImpulse exciter.

globalParams.name: Exciter Feedback Amount (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadFeedbackAmount (offset 33). norm→ feedback drive floor, *0.85 max. Default 0.0.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad feedback drive. Feedback exciter only.

globalParams.name: Exciter NoiseBurst Duration (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadNoiseBurstDuration (offset 34). norm→[2,15] ms. Registered default 0.230769 (≈5 ms). (Per-pad PadConfig default differs: 0.5.)
globalParams.controls: Selected pad noise-burst length. NoiseBurst exciter only.

globalParams.name: Exciter Friction Pressure (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadFrictionPressure (offset 35). norm→ +pressure*0.5 bias. Registered default 0.0 (aligned to per-pad default).
globalParams.controls: Selected pad bow pressure. Friction exciter only.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Filter Type (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter LP/HP/BP. Proxy → kPadTSFilterType (offset 7). idx=int(norm*3).

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Filter Cutoff (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSFilterCutoff (offset 8). norm→20*1000^norm Hz [20,20000]. Default 1.0 (bypass).

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Filter Resonance (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSFilterResonance (offset 9). norm→Q [0.707,10]. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Filter Env Amt (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSFilterEnvAmount (offset 10). norm*2-1 → [-1,+1]. Default 0.5 (=0).

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Drive (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSDriveAmount (offset 11). norm→drive [1,10] with unity makeup. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Fold (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSFoldAmount (offset 12). norm→fold [0,pi]. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper PitchEnv Start (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSPitchEnvStart (offset 13). norm→20*100^norm Hz [20,2000]. Registered default 0.070721 (≈160 Hz). (Per-pad PadConfig default 0.0.)

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper PitchEnv End (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSPitchEnvEnd (offset 14). norm→20*100^norm Hz. Default 0.0 (→20 Hz).

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper PitchEnv Time (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSPitchEnvTime (offset 15). norm*500 ms [0,500]. 0 disables pitch env. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper PitchEnv Curve (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadTSPitchEnvCurve (offset 16). Phase 10 repurposed from 2-step Exp/Lin StringList to continuous: norm*2-1 → [-1,+1], 0.5=linear. Default 0.5.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad pitch-env segment-1 curve. NOTE (M-7 memory): swapping this param's underlying type between StringList and Range at the same ID can break host editor caches.

globalParams.name: Tone Shaper Filter Atk/Dec/Sus/Rel (proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 220-223 → kPadTSFilterEnvAttack/Decay/Sustain/Release (offsets 17-20). Atk: norm^3*500 ms; Dec: norm^3*2000 ms; Sus: [0,1] level; Rel: norm^3*2000 ms. Defaults: Atk 0.0, Dec 0.1, Sus 0.0, Rel 0.1.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad filter ADSR. defaultNorm column here reflects Attack (0.0).

globalParams.name: Unnatural Mode Stretch (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadModeStretch (offset 21). norm is norm-of-[0.5,2.0]; phys=0.5+norm*1.5. Default 0.333333 (→1.0).

globalParams.name: Unnatural Decay Skew (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadDecaySkew (offset 22). norm*2-1 → [-1,+1]. Default 0.5 (→0).

globalParams.name: Unnatural Mode Inject (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadModeInjectAmount (offset 23). verbatim [0,1]. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Unnatural Nonlinear Coupling (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Continuous proxy → kPadNonlinearCoupling (offset 24). verbatim [0,1]. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Morph Enabled (proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Bool toggle (stepCount=1) proxy → kPadMorphEnabled (offset 25). >=0.5 = on. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Morph Start/End/Duration/Curve (proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 241-244 → kPadMorphStart/End/Duration/Curve (offsets 26-29). Start [0,1] def 1.0; End [0,1] def 0.0; Duration→10+norm*1990 ms def 0.095477(→200ms); Curve bool Lin/Exp def 0.0.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad material-morph params. defaultNorm column reflects Morph Start (1.0).

globalParams.name: Choke Group (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter stepped [0,8] default 0. Proxy → kPadChokeGroup (offset 30). norm→clamp(int(norm*8+0.5),0,8).

globalParams.name: Selected Pad
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter stepped [0,31] default 0 (31 steps). NOT a DSP param: selects which pad the global proxies (IDs 100-252, 282, 290-325) read/write. selectedPadIndex_ in processor & controller.
globalParams.controls: Which pad is shown/edited in the Selected-Pad panel.

globalParams.name: Global Coupling
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] (UI 0-100%) default 0.0. KIT-LEVEL. processor: clamp→globalCoupling_; couplingEngine_.setAmount(clamped). Drives the cross-pad sympathetic-resonance engine master amount.
globalParams.controls: Master amount of inter-pad sympathetic resonance (whole kit). 0 = engine effectively bypassed.

globalParams.name: Snare Buzz
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] (0-100%) default 0.0. KIT-LEVEL. clamp→snareBuzz_; triggers recomputeCouplingMatrix(). Weights snare-wire sympathetic coupling in the coupling matrix.
globalParams.controls: Amount of snare-wire buzz sympathetic coupling. Audible only with Global Coupling>0.

globalParams.name: Tom Resonance
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] (0-100%) default 0.0. KIT-LEVEL. clamp→tomResonance_; recomputeCouplingMatrix(). Weights tom-to-tom sympathetic coupling.
globalParams.controls: Amount of tom sympathetic resonance. Audible only with Global Coupling>0.

globalParams.name: Coupling Delay
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0.5,2.0] ms default 1.0. KIT-LEVEL. processor denorm from norm: delayMs = 0.5 + norm*1.5 → [0.5,2.0] ms; couplingDelayMs_. The pre-delay of the sympathetic coupling send (read via couplingDelay_ ring).
globalParams.controls: Delay time of the cross-pad coupling feed.

globalParams.name: UI Mode
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter {Simple,Advanced} (a.k.a. Acoustic/Extended). SESSION-scoped: NOT persisted in processor state; resets to 0 on state load; persisted only in the kit preset (codec hasSession). Pure UI visibility toggle, no DSP effect.
globalParams.controls: UI complexity mode. No audio effect.

globalParams.name: Output Bus (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter 16 entries (Main, Aux 1..15). Proxy → kPadOutputBus (offset 31). idx=clamp(int(norm*15+0.5),0,15).

globalParams.name: Noise/Click layer (global proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 290-297 → kPadNoiseLayerMix/Cutoff/Resonance/Decay/Color (290-294) and kPadClickLayerMix/ContactMs/Brightness (295-297), offsets 42-49. Each forwards verbatim norm to the selected pad; denorm happens per the per-pad entries. Defaults: NoiseMix 0.35, NoiseCutoff 0.5, NoiseReso 0.2, NoiseDecay 0.3, NoiseColor 0.5, ClickMix 0.5, ClickContact 0.3, ClickBright 0.6.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad noise/click layer. defaultNorm column reflects Noise Mix (0.35).

globalParams.name: Body Damping b1/b3 (global proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 300-301 → kPadBodyDampingB1/B3 (offsets 50-51). Registered/displayed default 0.5 each; DrumVoice keeps -1.0 sentinel until a write occurs. norm→b1 [0.2,50] s^-1; b3 [0,1e-3] s.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad per-mode damping law. defaultNorm reflects b1 (0.5).

globalParams.name: Air Loading (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Proxy → kPadAirLoading (offset 52). verbatim [0,1]. Default 0.6.

globalParams.name: Mode Scatter (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Proxy → kPadModeScatter (offset 53). verbatim [0,1]→[0,15%] dither. Default 0.0.

globalParams.name: Coupling Strength/Secondary (global proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 304-307 → kPadCouplingStrength/SecondaryEnabled/SecondarySize/SecondaryMaterial (offsets 54-57). CouplingStrength verbatim [0,1] def 0.0; SecondaryEnabled bool def 0.0; SecondarySize [0,1] def 0.5; SecondaryMaterial [0,1] def 0.4.
globalParams.controls: Selected pad head↔shell coupling. defaultNorm reflects Coupling Strength (0.0).

globalParams.name: Tension Mod (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Proxy → kPadTensionModAmt (offset 58). verbatim [0,1]. Default 0.0. Membrane-only effect.

globalParams.name: Pad Enabled (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: Bool proxy → kPadEnabled (offset 59). >=0.5 on. Default 1.0.

globalParams.name: Max Polyphony
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter stepped [4,16] voices, default 8, stepCount=12. KIT-LEVEL. processor: n = 4 + round(norm*12), clamp [4,16] → voicePool_.setMaxPolyphony. (Range param so its 'norm' is the [4,16] linear map; default 8 ≈ norm 0.333.)
globalParams.controls: Voice pool size for the whole instrument.

globalParams.name: Voice Stealing
globalParams.normToPhysical: StringListParameter {Oldest,Quietest,Priority}. KIT-LEVEL. processor: idx=clamp(int(norm*3),0,2) → setVoiceStealingPolicy. Default Oldest (0).
globalParams.controls: Policy used when the pool is exhausted.

globalParams.name: Master Gain
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [-24,+12] dB, default -6 dB, precision 1. KIT-LEVEL. processor stores masterGainNorm_; at output: dB = -24 + 36*norm; gain = 10^(dB/20). Applied to MAIN output L/R only (aux buses are pre-master). Default -6 dB ≈ norm 0.5.
globalParams.controls: Global master output level (post-mix, pre-true-peak-limiter on main bus).

globalParams.name: PitchEnv Knee/Mid/MidFrac/Curve2 (global proxies)
globalParams.normToPhysical: IDs 321-324 → kPadTSPitchEnvKneeEnabled/MidPitch/MidFraction/Curve2 (offsets 60-63). Knee bool def 0.0; Mid norm→20*100^norm Hz def 0.5(~141Hz); MidFrac [0,1] def 0.5; Curve2 norm*2-1 def 0.5(linear).
globalParams.controls: Selected pad 3-point pitch-env extension. defaultNorm reflects Knee (0.0).

globalParams.name: Pad Pan (global proxy)
globalParams.normToPhysical: RangeParameter [0,1] default 0.5. Proxy → kPadPan (offset 64). Equal-power pan; 0=L, 0.5=center, 1=R.

notes:
DISCRETE / float-as-bool params (>=0.5 = ON, else OFF unless noted): kPadMorphEnabled(25), kPadMorphCurve(29, false=Lin/true=Exp), kPadSecondaryEnabled(55), kPadEnabled(59, default 1.0=ON), kPadTSPitchEnvKneeEnabled(60). DISCRETE selectors decoded by truncation/round: kPadExciterType(0, *idx clamp to ExciterType::kCount), kPadBodyModel(1), kPadTSFilterType(7, int(norm*3)→LP/HP/BP), kPadChokeGroup(30, round(*8)), kPadOutputBus(31, round(*15)), kPadNoiseLayerColor(46, 4 threshold bands). Note the per-pad spec gives Exciter/Body stepCount=5 even though there are 6 entries — relies on the codec storing the enum directly, so values round-trip exactly; the StringList global proxies have the correct 6 entries.

SENTINEL params: kPadBodyDampingB1(50) and kPadBodyDampingB3(51) default to -1.0f in PadConfig (NOT the 0.5 registered/displayed default). -1.0 means 'derive from Decay (b1) / Material-brightness (b3)' and preserves Phase-1 bit-identity; the 0.5 default only takes effect once the host actively writes the param. A preset that wants the legacy behaviour must NOT write these (leave at -1 sentinel); writing 0.5 changes the sound (b1→25 s^-1, b3→5e-4). kPadTSPitchEnvTime(15)==0 is the master OFF sentinel for the ENTIRE pitch envelope (Start/End/Curve/Mid/Knee/Curve2 are all no-ops when Time==0). kPadChokeGroup(30)==0 = no choke. kPadOutputBus(31)==0 = main only. Mix params (NoiseMix 42, ClickMix 47, ModeInject 23, NonlinearCoupling 24)==0 are exact-bypass sentinels (zero added signal, no DSP work).

NORM-OF-A-RANGE params (the stored norm is NOT the physical value and 0.5 is NOT neutral): kPadModeStretch(21) default 0.333333 → physical 1.0 (norm-of [0.5,2.0]); kPadDecaySkew(22) default 0.5 → physical 0.0 (norm-of [-1,+1]); kPadTSFilterEnvAmount(10) default 0.5 → 0.0 bipolar; kPadTSPitchEnvCurve(16)/Curve2(63) default 0.5 → 0.0 (linear); kPadMorphDuration(28) 0.095477 → 200 ms. The 5 macros (37-41) are neutral at 0.5 (zero delta) but are NOT direct DSP — MacroMapper layers incremental deltas onto underlying per-pad params at control rate; a preset that sets both a macro and its underlying param can double-apply, and macros only move the *delta from the cached value*.

PER-BODY meaningfulness: modeStretch(21), decaySkew(22), modeScatter(53), bodyDampingB1/B3(50/51) are NO-OPs for the String body (waveguide, not a modal bank). airLoading(52) only affects frequencies in the MEMBRANE mapper (other modal mappers ignore it; String ignores it) — it is effectively Membrane-only. tensionModAmt(58) is MEMBRANE-ONLY (gated on getCurrentType()==Membrane in DrumVoice). Secondary/coupling (54-57) only run when secondaryEnabled>=0.5 AND couplingStrength>0; otherwise zero overhead and silent.

PER-EXCITER meaningfulness: fmRatio(32)=FMImpulse only; feedbackAmount(33)=Feedback only (and Feedback forces the slow per-sample body path + keeps the -3 dBFS body soft-clip while all other exciters get the transparent measured-strike norm); noiseBurstDuration(34)=NoiseBurst only (also reused by the Punch macro as a generic attack proxy); frictionPressure(35)=Friction only. The always-on Click(47-49) and Noise(42-46) layers and the pitch/filter/unnatural stages run regardless of exciter.

GAIN-STAGING (audit-corrected, AUDIT-signal-path-2026-06-07.md): voice out = hardClip(shaped*env*Level) — Level(6) is LINEAR, not dB; the per-voice hardClip is a transparent safety rail (kBodyHeadroom 0.5 = -6 dBFS strike-peak budget) not a musical gain stage. Body output gain uses the MEASURED-STRIKE normalisation (N-1): the bank is probed once per mode-config with a 2 ms raised-cosine strike and normalised so the resonant-strike PEAK hits kBodyHeadroom; cached on StrikeNormKey(body,material,size,decay,strikePos,modeStretch,decaySkew,airLoading,modeScatter,b1,b3) — so changing ANY of those re-probes. The parallel Noise and Click layers are calibrated ~6 dB UNDER the body (kStandaloneOutputGain 0.243 and 0.445 → ~-18 dBFS peak at mix=1) so they accent rather than mask the modal body. ToneShaper Drive has a 1/internalDrive makeup (M-2) so Drive adds harmonics, not level. NonlinearCoupling is a continuous, env-LEVEL-driven (not delta) AM brightener with exact amount==0 bypass (M-3/M-4). FM index is scaled on a unit-level modulator (0.5..3.0 rad) rather than clamped through setLevel (L-3). ModeInject uses 1/k (-6 dB/oct) amplitudes (audit §3-B). Final loudness make-up is Master Gain(320, default -6 dB) + per-pad Level — never the body headroom budget. Master Gain applies to the MAIN bus only (aux buses are pre-master sends). Per-pad Pan(64) is applied in the VoicePool mix AFTER Level, equal-power referenced to unity-at-center so 0.5 is bit-identical to the legacy mono duplication (M-9).

PROXY vs REAL: every global ID in 100-252, 282, 290-325 (except the kit-level set below) is a SELECTED-PAD PROXY forwarding to kPad* of the pad chosen by kSelectedPadId(260). They are not independent DSP state. True KIT-LEVEL (instrument-wide) params: kMaxPolyphonyId(250), kVoiceStealingId(251), kGlobalCouplingId(270), kSnareBuzzId(271), kTomResonanceId(272), kCouplingDelayId(273), kMasterGainId(320), and the session-only kUiModeId(280). Per-pad couplingAmount(36) is the pad's participation weight in that global coupling engine and is distinct from the per-pad head↔shell couplingStrength(54). Some proxy 'registered defaults' differ from the PadConfig struct defaults (e.g. ID204 NoiseBurst 0.230769 vs pad 0.5; ID216 PitchEnv Start 0.070721 vs pad 0.0) — these are display-only initial values; the authoritative DSP defaults are the PadConfig struct / kPadParamSpecs per-pad defaults. Param-stride is 128 (offsets 0-64 active, 65-127 reserved); padParamId = 1000 + padIndex*128 + offset. State version pinned at 3.
